title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 160.069 - Policy on consequences of possession or drinking alcohol at school or during extracurricular activities
text:
160.069.  Policy on consequences of possession or drinking alcohol at school or during extracurricular activities. — Every school district shall develop a policy by June 30, 2006, detailing the consequences that will result for a student at school if the student is found to be in possession or drinking alcohol either on school property or while representing the school at extracurricular activities.
(L. 2005 S.B. 402)
